scope: Internal clause-relation graph cleanup only; intended semantic change NONE.

expected: One graph container covers the full nonpunctuation sequence.
One typed causal relation edge contains exactly two overt member spans.
因為 and 所以 remain visible and owned by the left and right members respectively; the comma remains visible exactly once.
The weather clause and negative motion clause preserve their local typed analyses, roles, and Jyutping.
forbidden: The graph container must not create causal meaning by itself.
No hidden subject, clause, linker, or result is inserted.
No linker or separator may be duplicated across graph, edge, and member layers.
exact_positive.surface_evidence: accepted regression plus one-speaker naturalness screening; not native analysis validation

expected: One graph container covers the full nonpunctuation sequence.
One typed conditional relation edge contains exactly two overt member spans.
如果 and 就 remain visible with left-linker and right-linker ownership; the comma remains visible exactly once.
Each local clause preserves its own overt subject and motion predicate.
forbidden: Do not require shared subjects.
Do not infer conditionality from 就 alone.
No hidden consequent, subject, or linker.
exact_positive.surface_evidence: accepted regression plus one-speaker naturalness screening; exact subtype evidence is external, exact parser analysis is not

expected: One graph container covers the full nonpunctuation sequence.
One typed sequential relation edge contains exactly two overt member spans.
先 and 再 remain visible and separately owned by the earlier and later members; the comma remains visible exactly once.
食飯 and 做功課 preserve their local VP analyses, roles, and Jyutping.
forbidden: The graph or member label must not independently license temporal order.
Do not fabricate a second subject for the later member.
Do not flatten the two VPs into one opaque sequence.
exact_positive.surface_evidence: accepted regression preservation seed; sequence subtype boundaries are source-linked elsewhere

expected: One graph container covers the full nonpunctuation sequence.
One typed temporal-subordinate relation edge contains exactly two overt member spans.
一 and 就 remain visible with member-specific linker ownership; the comma remains visible exactly once.
見到佢 and 我就笑 preserve local predicate and nominal material.
forbidden: Do not infer all 一...就... strings from punctuation or adjacency alone.
Do not treat 就 as uniquely conditional.
No hidden temporal operator, subject, or clause.
exact_positive.surface_evidence: accepted regression plus one-speaker naturalness screening; source links establish temporal/就 boundaries, not this parser ontology

expected: The graph and one causal edge preserve the postposed reason order.
The left member remains the result/matrix clause and the right member remains the reason clause.
因為 stays overt inside the right member; the comma is preserved exactly once.
forbidden: Do not reorder members into canonical reason-before-result order.
Do not assign causal meaning from the graph label alone.
No hidden 所以.

expected: The graph and one causal edge preserve a left overt causal linker without inventing a paired right linker.
Both member spans and the comma remain overt and fully covered.
Local weather and negative-motion analyses remain unchanged.
forbidden: No hidden 所以.
Do not require paired linkers.
Do not duplicate 因為 as graph-level material.

expected: The graph and one conditional edge preserve an overt 如果 antecedent and an unmarked consequent.
Both overt subjects remain local to their clauses.
The comma remains visible exactly once.
forbidden: No hidden 就.
Do not require subject identity.
Do not classify the graph container itself as the conditional construction.

expected: The graph and one temporal-subordinate edge preserve an unmarked left member and overt right-side 就.
Both member spans and the comma remain fully visible.
Local VP and nominal material remain unchanged.
forbidden: No hidden 一.
Do not reinterpret 就 as automatically conditional.
Do not fabricate a left subject.

expected: A discourse/root accounting container may cover the three overt nominal spans and separators.
No typed relation edge or relation-member semantics are introduced.
All three 人 tokens and both commas remain visible.
forbidden: No causal, conditional, sequential, temporal, concessive, or coordination relation from punctuation alone.
No hidden predicates or clauses.
No ClauseRelation or ClauseRelationMember solely because multiple spans are present.

expected: The overt right-side sequential member remains under NeedsContext rather than a complete graph edge.
再 and 做功課 remain visible with their existing roles and Jyutping.
No absent earlier event is inserted.
forbidden: No complete ClauseRelation edge.
No hidden left member, subject, or separator.
ClauseRelationMember must not independently license sequence meaning.

expected: The overt right causal/result member remains under NeedsContext rather than a complete graph edge.
所以 and the local clause remain visible.
No missing reason clause is inserted.
forbidden: No complete ClauseRelation edge.
No hidden 因為/reason clause.
No graph-level causal license from 所以 alone.

expected: The overt conditional antecedent member remains under NeedsContext rather than a complete graph edge.
如果 and the local clause remain visible.
No missing consequent is inserted.
forbidden: No complete ClauseRelation edge.
No hidden consequent or 就.
No standalone-complete status from the member wrapper.

native_review.question: Sounds unnatural
native_review.not_required_reason: No language-form change is authorized; exact surfaces are preservation anchors and the packet tests structural equivalence only.

expected_structure.requirement: The internal ClauseRelationGraph groups already parsed members, edges, separators, and discourse material; it cannot assign a semantic relation by itself.
Every ClauseRelationEdge keeps an explicit relation subtype inherited from an already mapped language-sensitive rule; punctuation, adjacency, or graph membership is insufficient.
ClauseRelationMemberSpan stores one overt left/right member and its owned linker material; it cannot independently create a complete relation, missing clause, or context resolution.
Every overt linker and separator is represented exactly once in the graph/edge/member accounting; no deletion or duplication is permitted.
Each member retains its local clause, VP, NP, roles, Jyutping, span, and provenance without flattening or hidden-token insertion.
A lone left or right relation member remains context-required and does not become a complete edge or graph-level semantic claim.
A multi-span discourse wrapper may exist without a typed edge; commas or repeated nominal spans do not establish a clause relation.
Historical public diagnostic labels may remain as compatibility metadata only and cannot affect learner display, construction selection, or semantics.

forbidden_analyses: Treating ClauseLinkingSequence, ClauseRelation, or ClauseRelationMember as independent Cantonese grammar claims.
Inferring causal, conditional, temporal, sequential, concessive, or topic-chain meaning from punctuation, adjacency, or graph membership alone.
Inserting a missing member, linker, subject, predicate, separator, or relation subtype.
Requiring paired linkers or shared subjects where the mapped subtype does not require them.
Deleting or duplicating overt linkers and separators during internal consolidation.
Letting a relation-member span become a complete relation or resolve its own context requirement.
Changing learner-visible tokens, roles, Jyutping, local structure, root coverage, or meaning under a cleanup labeled semantic change NONE.
automated_gates: Packet identity, mode, family, actions, and authorization boundary validate.
Development minimums: 4 positive subtype anchors, 4 positive variants, 4 negative boundaries, and 8 render cases.
Baseline public-signature equivalence for all 12 visible cases.
Full-relation positives preserve one graph, one typed edge, two members, overt linkers, and separators.
Incomplete-member negatives preserve NeedsContext with no complete typed edge.
Graph-only negative preserves no typed edge or member semantics.
Aggregate regression and grammar-legitimacy gates remain at accepted baseline with supported_productive=0.
main.js, manifest.json, and styles.css remain unchanged during packet design.
No prospective held-out surface, salt, or expected signature is present in the clean project.
Evaluator-custody commitments and archive checksum verify.

authorization_boundary: NEW EXPLICIT USER AUTHORIZATION IS REQUIRED after packet review and before any I02 parser code change. Authorization for I04 is consumed and does not carry forward.
dependency_effect: I02 must be accepted before I01 ClauseSpan implementation because relation members must contain typed clause spans.
